description: Camera zooms into a city from space, crosshair locks on with a rotating scan animation and forensic HUD overlay. Best for surveillance, target acquisition, intelligence briefings, classified locations.

fields.MAP_LABEL_1: City key (uppercase): LOS_ANGELES, NEW_YORK, LONDON, DUBAI, TOKYO, KYIV, MOSCOW, TEHRAN, GAZA, BEIJING, SINGAPORE, CAIRO
fields.TAG_1: Classification or operation tag, e.g. 'TOP SECRET' or 'OPERATION BLACKOUT'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Intel summary, e.g. 'Satellite imagery confirms activity at the facility since March 2024'
fields.LABEL_1: Label for stat 1, e.g. 'CONFIRMED TARGETS' or 'RADIUS'
fields.LABEL_2: Label for stat 2, e.g. 'OBSERVATION WINDOW' or 'STATUS'
